articles.title_en: Hanoi's Yen Xa Wastewater Treatment Plant Phase 2 Fully Operational, Boosting Capital's Environmental Resilience
articles.summary_en: MONRE celebrates full operation of Yen Xa Phase 2, significantly expanding Hanoi's wastewater treatment capacity.

articles.summary_en: MONRE launches 'Green Water 2030' strategy, promoting private sector and green tech for sustainable water management.

articles.summary_en: MONRE pilot in Mekong Delta successfully deploys AI-driven decentralized water treatment for climate-resilient solutions.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Nationwide Waste Sorting Initiative: Early 2026 Enforcement Yields Mixed Results
articles.summary_en: Initial 2026 enforcement of household waste sorting shows promise in cities, challenges in rural areas.

articles.summary_en: Vietnam's 2026 EPR regulations drive significant recycling investments in packaging, electronics.

articles.title_en: MONRE Boosts Enforcement: Digital Tools & Higher Penalties for Waste Violations in 2026
articles.summary_en: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment tightens 2026 waste regulation enforcement with tech.
articles.source: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MONRE)

articles.summary_en: A new ADB loan supports Vietnam's efforts to modernize digital infrastructure, enhancing connectivity and economic competitiveness.

articles.summary_en: ADB-supported projects in Vietnam successfully integrate smart technologies, significantly boosting efficiency in urban water and wastewater systems by 2026.

articles.summary_en: World Bank funds new phase for Vietnam's climate-smart water, targeting vulnerable delta regions by 2026.

articles.summary_en: Report highlights World Bank green water infrastructure's environmental, policy impacts in Vietnam by 2026.

articles.summary_en: Key road, port, and energy projects advance, enhancing connectivity and operational efficiency for industrial parks.

articles.summary_en: New regulations and incentives promote sustainable industrial park development, appealing to ESG-conscious investors.

articles.summary_en: Vietnam invests heavily in smart grid and storage solutions to integrate new solar capacity effectively, aligning with PDP8.
